title: Mandala Iron's Spellbooks
description: The Mandala GUI style made compatible with Iron's Spells 'n' Spellbooks
body:
### The Mandala GUI style made compatible with Iron's Spells 'n' Spellbooks

## Update - v0.1.0
- Retextured spell selection GUI
- Fixed EMI/JEI recipe textures
  
![New Spell Selection GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/250349ba1e47c129aec619eb44a23e277656a045.png)
![Fixed EMI texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcdc8acd9adc27ab4bcd13935ded05af05af997.png)![Cauldron EMI texture fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd5c315169357a05b8a808ead9b7d1e4c2f3c4d2.png)

## Release - v0.0.1
- Retexures UI for the Scroll Forge, Arcane Anvil, and Inscription Table
  
### Scroll Forge
![New Scroll Forge UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51ea2c3cd4c1feebcdef811f231a6e27b635ec34.png)
### Arcane Anvil
![New Arcane Anvil UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1b514085a9bdb1893ffd91f4adb3840188028a.png)
### Inscription Table
